description: POWER and SQRT math functions return f64 non-nullable on non-null input
name: math_power_sqrt
query_sql:
-- @name PowerSqrt
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, POWER(value, 2) AS squared, SQRT(value) AS root FROM measurements
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE measurements (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL, quantity INTEGER NOT NULL);
